channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Egypt Forced to Return to Spokane After Security Officials Reject Seattle Stay Request Ahead of Iran Match
item.description: Egypt's national football team confirmed that their request to remain in Seattle after defeating New Zealand at the 2026 FIFA World Cup was rejected by local security authorities. The Pharaohs had jus...

item.title: Higher Interest Rate Risks Under Fed Chair Kevin Warsh Could Increase Financing Costs for AI-Focused Tech Companies
item.description: The article argues that the appointment of Kevin Warsh as chairman of the Federal Reserve could create new challenges for major technology companies that are heavily investing in artificial intelligen...

item.title: Rachel Ruto Donates Shoes to 1,665 Pupils at Karen C Comprehensive School in Nairobi
item.description: First Lady Rachel Ruto visited Karen C Comprehensive School in Nairobi, where she met learners and spoke to them about the value of education, discipline and hard work in achieving their goals. During...

item.title: Justice Neil Gorsuch and Trump Ally Mike Davis Reportedly Part Ways Amid Disputes Over Supreme Court Decisions
item.description: A reported rift has emerged between U.S. Supreme Court Justice Neil Gorsuch and conservative activist and attorney Mike Davis, a longtime ally who played a significant role in Gorsuch’s judicial caree...

item.title: New Zealand Poultry Industry Increases Biosecurity Measures After H5N1 Bird Flu Detected in Western Australia
item.description: New Zealand's poultry industry and government authorities are closely monitoring developments after Australia confirmed two cases of the highly pathogenic H5N1 bird flu strain in wild birds in Western...

item.title: Government allocates R600 million for security measures ahead of planned anti-migrant demonstrations
item.description: The South African government has announced that more than R600 million will be redirected from existing budgets to fund a large-scale security operation ahead of planned anti-migrant protests schedule...

item.title: Prime Minister Mark Carney selects Chief Justice Glenn Joyal for appointment to the Supreme Court of Canada
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney has nominated Glenn Joyal, the long-serving Chief Justice of the Court of King’s Bench of Manitoba, to join the Supreme Court of Canada. The appointment follows the retireme...

item.title: Paul Krugman Argues Trump's Foreign Policy and Governance Could Cause Long-Term Damage to U.S. Credibility
item.description: Economist and Nobel Prize winner Paul Krugman criticized President Donald Trump's handling of foreign policy, particularly regarding the recent conflict involving Iran, during an interview on Greg Sar...

item.title: Prime Minister Mark Carney appoints Manitoba Chief Justice Glenn Joyal to the Supreme Court of Canada
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney announced on June 22, 2026, that Glenn Joyal, Chief Justice of Manitoba's superior court, will join the Supreme Court of Canada. Joyal fills the vacancy created by the retir...

item.title: The Historical Evolution of Iran's Nuclear Program and the Origins of Preventive Nuclear Strikes in the Middle East
item.description: The article examines the history of Iran’s nuclear program, emphasizing the shifting alliances and strategic interests that have shaped its development. It begins with the United States' 'Atoms for Pe...

item.title: Bangladeshi Media Leaders Call for Ethical AI Policies, Training, and Human Oversight in Journalism
item.description: A roundtable organized by the Media Resources Development Initiative (MRDI) and The Daily Star, with support from UNDP, brought together journalists, academics, media executives, and international org...

item.title: Nicole Kidman Marks Father’s Day by Honoring Keith Urban and Remembering Her Late Father
item.description: Nicole Kidman used Father’s Day to publicly recognize two important father figures in her life: her former husband Keith Urban and her late father, Dr. Antony Kidman. On June 21, the actress shared a ...

item.title: Zanzibar Approves Record TZS 8.52 Trillion Budget Focused on Economic Growth, Investment and Financial Market Development
item.description: Zanzibar has approved a TZS 8.52 trillion budget for the 2026/27 financial year, representing a 22.11% increase compared to the previous year’s budget. The government aims to achieve economic growth o...

item.title: Photo of JD Vance at Switzerland Talks Sparks Online Speculation Over Identification Card Visible in Laptop
item.description: A photograph shared on social media by Qatari Prime Minister Mohammed bin Abdulrahman bin Jassim Al Thani during diplomatic discussions in Switzerland generated widespread online speculation about an ...

item.title: Senate impeachment pre-trial reviews thousands of documents in case against Vice President Sara Duterte
item.description: Ang ikalawang araw ng pre-trial proceedings sa impeachment case laban kay Vice President Sara Duterte ay nakatuon sa pagproseso ng napakaraming documentary evidence, lalo na para sa unang artikulo ng ...

item.title: Rick Scott Invites Trump to Senate GOP Lunch Amid Tensions With Majority Leader John Thune
item.description: President Donald Trump is expected to attend a Senate Republican Steering Committee lunch on Wednesday after being invited by Senator Rick Scott of Florida. According to the report, some Republican la...

item.title: Early Portraits of Cyndi Lauper During Her Blue Angel Years in 1980 Amsterdam
item.description: The article looks back at a 1980 portrait session featuring Cyndi Lauper in Amsterdam during her time as the lead singer of the band Blue Angel, several years before she became an international solo s...

item.title: Republican Critics Question Trump Administration's Iran Agreement Following Breakdown of Talks
item.description: A political discussion emerged after several Republican figures publicly criticized President Donald Trump's handling of negotiations and conflict-related policies involving Iran. According to comment...

item.title: Opinion Column Argues Trump's Public Behavior Reflects Isolation, Anger, and Personal Dissatisfaction
item.description: In this opinion article, journalist Ray Richmond argues that President Donald Trump's behavior during the 2026 G7 summit reflects a deeply unhappy and resentful personality. The author describes Trump...

item.title: Keir Starmer Resigns as UK Prime Minister, Endorses Successor Amid Labour Party Challenges
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer announced his resignation on Monday outside 10 Downing Street, ending his short tenure after less than two years in office. This decision comes after mounting press...
